# Kinetic Gain Directory

> Curated directory of vendors publishing Kinetic Gain disclosures.

Curated list of domains known to publish Kinetic Gain Protocol Suite documents at canonical /.well-known/ URLs. Vendors self-submit via PR after verifying with walker.kineticgain.com. v0.1 manually curated; v0.2 may add automated freshness checks.

## Identity

- **Subdomain**: [directory.kineticgain.com](https://directory.kineticgain.com/)
- **Spec repo**: [github.com/mizcausevic-dev/kinetic-gain-directory](https://github.com/mizcausevic-dev/kinetic-gain-directory)
- **Buyer audience**: Procurement reviewers · CMIOs · CISOs auditing vendor inventory
- **Category**: Hub — vendor directory
- **License**: AGPL-3.0 for spec text; Apache-2.0 for the landing site
- **Deployment**: GitHub Actions FTP CI/CD on push to main

## Pages

- [/](https://directory.kineticgain.com/): Kinetic Gain Directory — Curated directory of vendors publishing Kinetic Gain disclosures.

## Part of the Kinetic Gain Protocol Suite

A family of **10 open JSON specifications** for the answer-engine and agent era — five core (AEO, Prompt Provenance, Agent Cards, AI Evidence Format, MCP Tool Cards), a three-spec EdTech trio (Tutor Cards / Student AI Disclosure / Classroom AI AUP), a HealthTech extension (Clinical AI Disclosure), and a cross-cutting Incident Card. **Two regulated verticals covered.**

- **Front door**: [suite.kineticgain.com](https://suite.kineticgain.com/)
- **Quickstart hub**: [docs.kineticgain.com](https://docs.kineticgain.com/)
- **Unified MCP server** (34 tools, 8 specs, v0.4.0): [github.com/mizcausevic-dev/mcp-kinetic-gain](https://github.com/mizcausevic-dev/mcp-kinetic-gain)
- **Unified visualizer** (8 renderers): [github.com/mizcausevic-dev/kinetic-gain-visualizer](https://github.com/mizcausevic-dev/kinetic-gain-visualizer)
- **Meta-repo**: [github.com/mizcausevic-dev/kinetic-gain-protocol-suite](https://github.com/mizcausevic-dev/kinetic-gain-protocol-suite)

## Author

- **Miz Causevic** · Director / Principal Platform Engineering · Boston, MA
- [github.com/mizcausevic-dev](https://github.com/mizcausevic-dev) · [linkedin.com/in/mirzacausevic](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mirzacausevic/) · [kineticgain.com](https://kineticgain.com/) · [medium.com/@mizcausevic](https://medium.com/@mizcausevic/)
- ~30 years across IBM, CyberArk, Alteryx, Digital.ai, Gryphon.ai
